home.tagline: Book your ride in Havana. Fast, safe, and affordable.
home.download_subtitle: Available on Android and iOS. Book your ride in seconds.
home.hero_subtitle: Request triciclos, motos, and cars — fast, safe, and affordable. The #1 taxi app in Cuba.
home.how_subtitle: Book your ride in 3 simple steps
home.how_step1_desc: Open the app and select where you want to go.
home.how_step2_desc: Triciclo, moto, or car. You choose how to travel.
home.how_step3_desc: A verified driver picks you up in minutes.
home.services_subtitle: The right vehicle for every need
home.service_triciclo_desc: Havana's iconic transport. Comfortable and affordable.
home.service_moto_desc: Fast and agile for short distances.
home.service_auto_desc: Comfort and space for longer trips.
home.service_mensajeria_desc: Fast delivery of packages and documents.
home.feature_pricing_desc: Know the fare before you confirm. No surprises.
home.feature_tracking_desc: Follow your ride on the map and share your location.
home.feature_safety_desc: Verified drivers rated by the community.
home.feature_payment_desc: Pay with cash or TriciCoin. Your choice.
home.download_cta_subtitle: Available on Android and iOS. Your next ride is one tap away.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: TriciGo ("we", "our") operates the TriciGo mobile application and website. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our transportation services.
privacy.data_collected_intro: We collect the following information to provide you with the service:
privacy.data_name_phone: Full name and phone number (account registration)
privacy.data_location: Real-time location (only during active app use to connect you with nearby drivers)
privacy.data_ride_history: Ride history (origin, destination, fare, date and time)
privacy.data_device: Device information (model, operating system, push notification token)
privacy.data_use_intro: We use your information exclusively to:
privacy.use_provide_service: Connect you with drivers and manage your rides
privacy.use_improve: Improve service quality and user experience
privacy.use_safety: Ensure the safety of passengers and drivers
privacy.use_communications: Send you notifications about your rides and service updates
privacy.sharing_text: We share your name and location with the driver assigned to your ride so they can pick you up. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for commercial purposes. We may share anonymized data for statistical purposes.
privacy.retention_text: We retain your personal information as long as your account remains active. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us. Ride history is retained for a minimum of 1 year for legal and safety requirements.
privacy.right_deletion: Request deletion of your account and data
privacy.right_portability: Request a copy of your data in a portable format
privacy.security_text: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your information, including encryption in transit (TLS/SSL), secure authentication, and restricted access to personal data. However, no system is 100% secure.
privacy.children_text: TriciGo is not directed at children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect information from minors. If we discover we have collected data from a minor, we will promptly delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the application or other means. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes your acceptance.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, contact us:

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Service
terms.acceptance_text: By downloading, installing, or using the TriciGo application, you agree to these Terms and Conditions of Service. If you disagree, do not use the service. TriciGo reserves the right to modify these terms with prior notice.
terms.service_desc_text: TriciGo is a technology platform that connects passengers with independent drivers of triciclos, motorcycles, and cars in Havana, Cuba. TriciGo is not a transportation company; it acts as a technology intermediary facilitating connections between users and drivers.
terms.eligibility_text: To use TriciGo you must be at least 18 years old, have a valid mobile phone number in Cuba, and provide accurate information when registering. Drivers must meet additional documentation and verification requirements.
terms.accounts_text: Each user must create an account with a valid phone number. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and all activities conducted under it. You must not share your account with third parties. TriciGo may suspend or cancel accounts that violate these terms.
terms.rides_text: When requesting a ride, you will receive a fare estimate that may vary based on actual distance, time, and demand conditions (surge pricing). The final fare is agreed upon between passenger and driver. TriciGo charges a service commission on each completed ride.
terms.payments_text: Payments can be made in cash (CUP) or via TriciCoin balance (platform virtual currency). TriciCoin balance is not refundable as cash except for drivers through the established redemption process. Fares are displayed in local currency (CUP).
terms.cancellations_text: You may cancel a ride before the driver arrives at the pickup point. Frequent or late cancellations may result in temporary restrictions on your account. Drivers may also cancel rides under justified circumstances.
terms.conduct_respectful: Treat drivers and passengers with respect and courtesy
terms.conduct_laws: Comply with all applicable local laws and regulations
terms.conduct_no_fraud: Not engage in fraudulent activities or manipulate the referral or promotions system
terms.conduct_no_damage: Not cause damage to vehicles or other users' belongings
terms.liability_text: TriciGo facilitates connections between passengers and drivers but is not directly responsible for transportation. We do not guarantee permanent service availability. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the service in question. We are not responsible for lost items, although we will facilitate communication between parties.
terms.ip_text: The TriciGo application, its design, logo, name, and content are property of TriciGo. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without written authorization.
terms.termination_text: TriciGo may suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time if you violate these terms, engage in fraudulent activities, or endanger other users' safety. You may delete your account at any time from the app settings.
terms.modifications_text: TriciGo may modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time. We will notify you of significant changes with reasonable advance notice.
terms.governing_law_text: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Cuba. Any dispute shall be resolved in the competent courts of Havana, Cuba.
terms.contact_text: For inquiries about these Terms and Conditions:
